title: pleopeltis contorta
intro: Pleopeltis contorta, also known as the twisted polypody, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis contorta include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Pleopeltis contorta is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it may also be used in topical applications to speed up the healing process of minor cuts and scrapes.
